meaning: 克拉克曼南郡[英国苏格兰原郡名]
examples: Stirling Royal Infirmary serves an estimated population of 130, 000 in the Stirling and Clackmannanshire area.
School pupils in Clackmannanshire could be set to have their summer holidays at a different time.
Indeed we've shown at Clackmannanshire Council we can both improve services and reduce costs.
